description_long: This rifle features a modern, angular design with a predominantly gray body accented by a striking red barrel and subtle orange and white highlights. The frame is constructed with a geometric, blocky aesthetic, including a prominent trigger guard and a pistol-style grip. The upper receiver houses a compact sighting system, and the magazine appears integrated into the lower section of the rifle. The barrel is elongated and colored in a deep red, contrasting with the rest of the weapon. The overall build suggests a lightweight, tactical firearm suitable for urban environments. The surface finish is matte, with visible panel lines and minimal reflective elements.
description: A modern, angular rifle with a gray body, red barrel, and compact sighting system, featuring a blocky, tactical design and matte finish.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the red barrel, the angular gray body, and the compact sighting system on top.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the muzzle, the geometric alignment of the barrel, and the layered structure of the upper receiver.
description_view_2: Opposite side view mirroring view 0, with clear visibility of the grip, trigger guard, and integrated magazine.
description_view_3: Rear view focusing on the stock area, sighting system, and the alignment of the barrel with the rest of the rifle.
